positive: A symmetrical, intricate graphic design featuring bioluminescent celestial flora and mystical woodland sprites. The composition must be highly detailed, centered, and suitable for a screen-printed t-shirt. Use a strong silhouette style, emphasizing clean lines and solid color areas. The primary color palette consists of deep indigo, glowing teal, electric cyan, and accents of antique gold. The scene depicts stylized glowing mushrooms, intertwined root systems forming celestial constellations, and ethereal, graceful forest spirits floating among the elements. High contrast, mystical atmosphere, clean vector art style, flat graphic design elements, maximalist composition, decorative, perfect symmetry.
